CREATE TABLE transactions (id INTEGER, transaction_date DATE);
INSERT INTO transactions VALUES (1, current_date), (2, current_date - INTERVAL '1 day'), (3, current_date + INTERVAL '1 day');
SELECT id, transaction_date FROM transactions WHERE transaction_date = current_date;
SELECT id, transaction_date FROM transactions WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN current_date - INTERVAL '7 days' AND current_date;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE transaction_date < current_date;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INTEGER, join_date DATE);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, current_date - INTERVAL '10 days'), (2, current_date - INTERVAL '20 days');
SELECT u.user_id, COUNT(t.id) AS transaction_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN transactions t ON u.join_date <= t.transaction_date GROUP BY u.user_id;
SELECT MAX(transaction_date) as last_transaction_date FROM transactions WHERE transaction_date <= current_date;
CREATE VIEW recent_transactions AS SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE transaction_date = current_date;
SELECT * FROM recent_transactions WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM transactions WHERE transaction_date = current_date);
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date = current_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_transactions FROM transactions;
